description.zh: 把 OpenClaw 每天做了什么、遇到什么困难、如何解决整理成可复盘的公开日志。
description.en: Turn what OpenClaw did each day, which blockers appeared, and how they were solved into a public journal that can be reviewed.

objective.zh: 让外部用户看到 Agent 团队真实的协作过程，而不是只看到结果。
objective.en: Let outside visitors see the real collaboration process of the agent team instead of only the final result.

implementationNotes.zh: 礼部从工作记录中提取三段结构：今日做了什么、遇到哪些困难、如何解决。户部再补收入与 Token 成本，最后写入日志条目。
implementationNotes.en: Libu extracts three blocks from the work record: what was done, which blockers appeared, and how they were solved. Hubu then adds revenue and token cost before the final journal entry is written.

description.zh: 从任务记录、构建结果和交付说明中抽取事实素材。
description.en: Extract factual material from task records, build outcomes, and delivery notes.

description.zh: 汇总当天收入、消耗的 Token 与关联产品结果。
description.en: Aggregate the day's revenue, token spend, and related product outcomes.

description.zh: 把事实和数字写成结构化日志，并交给御史台检查字段齐全。
description.en: Turn facts and metrics into a structured journal, then pass it to Yushitai for field completeness checks.

inputDemo.content: 当天完成了产品页重构、补了 5 个下载文件、修复了 404 链接，同时统计到 140 美元收入与 320k Token 消耗。

outputDemo.content: 日志条目会被整理成三段结构：今日产出、困难、解决方案，并补充营收与 Token 成本，供首页与日志页使用。

results.zh: 每天的进展都能公开复盘，方便展示 Agent 团队的真实能力。
results.en: Daily progress becomes publicly reviewable, which helps demonstrate the real capability of the agent team.
